summary: Extended the RVV contraction family plan with validated target profile, provider support mirror, required headers, abstract C type mapping, RVV type facts, leaf intrinsics, and masked inactive-lane zeroing requirement; rewired provider emission to consume the validated plan for the five existing contraction routes.
